current_desc: Primary key. DWH values: 0=N/A (placeholder), 1=Pending, 2=InProcess, 3=Processed, 4=Canceled. Note: production has 17 states (IDs 5-17 missing from DWH). Stored in withdrawal request records and updated as requests progress
source_desc: Primary key identifying the withdrawal lifecycle state. 1=Pending, 2=InProcess, 3=Processed, 4=Canceled, 5=Partially Processed, 6=Payment Sent, 7=Rejected, 8=RejectedByProvider, 9=PendingByProvider, 10=SentToProvider, 11=SentToBilling, 12=ReceivedByBilling, 13=Failed, 14=Pending Review, 15=Under Review, 16=Reversed, 17=Partially Reversed. See [Cashout Status](_glossary.md#cashout-status). (Dictionary.CashoutStatus)
new_audit_proposed_fix: Primary key identifying withdrawal lifecycle state (17 values: 1=Pending through 17=Partially Reversed; 0=N/A is a DWH placeholder). See glossary for full mapping. (Tier 1 - Dictionary.CashoutStatus)
old_judge_suggested_rewrite: Primary key identifying the cashout status. Loaded via full TRUNCATE+INSERT from [DWH_staging].[etoro_Dictionary_CashoutStatus] with no filter, so all production statuses (17 states) are present in the DWH.
final_proposed_fix: Primary key identifying withdrawal lifecycle state (17 values: 1=Pending through 17=Partially Reversed; 0=N/A is a DWH placeholder). See glossary for full mapping. (Tier 1 - Dictionary.CashoutStatus)

current_desc: Primary key. DWH rename of production `ID`. Values 0-26. 0=Customer (manual), 1=Stop Loss, 2=End of Week, 3=SL via trade server, 4=Return to Market, 5=Take Profit, 6=TP via trade server, 7=Contact Rollover, 8=BackOffice, 9=Hierarchical Close, 10=Hierarchical close by recovery, 11=Join Demo Challenge, 12=Close All, 13=Copy Stop Loss, 14=Mirror manual, 15=Manual Liquidation, 16=BSL, 17=Manual Unregister, 18=BackOffice Unregister, 19=Redeem, 20=Operational adjustment, 21=Orphaned, 22=Transferred Out, 23=Alignment, 24=Delist, 25=Close by rate, 26=Expiry. Stored permanently with every closed position
old_judge_suggested_rewrite: Primary key. DWH rename of production `ID`. Maps 27 close-position action types (0–26) from Dictionary.ClosePositionActionType, including 7=Contract Rollover (not 'Contact'). Stored permanently with every closed position.
final_proposed_fix: Primary key. DWH rename of production `ID`. Maps 27 close-position action types (0–26) from Dictionary.ClosePositionActionType, including 7=Contract Rollover (not 'Contact'). Stored permanently with every closed position.

current_desc: FK to etoro.Dictionary.MarketingRegion. Marketing segment ID grouping countries by marketing strategy. Distinct from geographic RegionID (which is dropped in DWH). 22 distinct values matching the 22 Region labels
source_desc: FK to Dictionary.MarketingRegion. Segments countries for marketing campaigns. Distinct from geographic Region — MarketingRegion groups by marketing strategy (e.g., "Arabic" cuts across Asia/Africa regions)
new_audit_proposed_fix: FK to Dictionary.MarketingRegion. Segments countries by marketing strategy (e.g. 'Arabic' cuts across Asia/Africa regions). Distinct from geographic RegionID. (Tier 1 - Dictionary.Country)
old_judge_contradicting_fact: Lookup table defining the 21 geographic marketing segments used for customer acquisition, localization, and regional reporting.
old_judge_suggested_rewrite: FK to Dictionary.MarketingRegion. Marketing segment ID grouping countries by marketing strategy. Distinct from geographic RegionID (which is not carried into the DWH). 21 defined values (0=Unknown through 99=eToro, with gaps).
final_proposed_fix: FK to Dictionary.MarketingRegion. Segments countries by marketing strategy (e.g. 'Arabic' cuts across Asia/Africa regions). Distinct from geographic RegionID. (Tier 1 - Dictionary.Country)

current_desc: Bank Identification Number. First 6 or 8 digits of the card number identifying the issuing bank and card product. Values < 10,000,000 are 6-digit BINs; >= 10,000,000 are 8-digit BINs. Clustered index key for fast lookups
source_desc: 6-digit BIN (must be < 10,000,000 per CHK_CountryBin6). Part of composite PK. Indexed by IX_DCNB_Bincode
new_audit_proposed_fix: 6-digit Bank Identification Number (BIN) identifying the issuing bank; constrained to values < 10,000,000 per CHK_CountryBin6. Part of composite PK and indexed by IX_DCNB_Bincode (Tier 1 - Dictionary.CountryBin6)
old_judge_contradicting_fact: The CHECK constraint (BinCode < 10000000) ensures only 6-digit BINs are stored here. BINs of 8 digits or more belong in Dictionary.CountryBin8.
old_judge_suggested_rewrite: Bank Identification Number (6-digit). First 6 digits of the card number identifying the issuing bank and card product. Part of the composite primary key with CountryID. Source upstream table enforces BinCode < 10,000,000 via CHECK constraint; 8-digit BINs are stored separately in Dictionary.CountryBin8.
final_proposed_fix: 6-digit Bank Identification Number (BIN) identifying the issuing bank; constrained to values < 10,000,000 per CHK_CountryBin6. Part of composite PK and indexed by IX_DCNB_Bincode (Tier 1 - Dictionary.CountryBin6)

current_desc: Affiliate (partner) ID under which the customer was acquired (renamed from SerialID). FK to BackOffice.Affiliate. NULL for direct/organic registrations

current_desc: Whether the user can post to the social feed or chat. False when IsBlocked=1 and for status 3 (Chat Blocked). True for all other statuses including close-only
source_desc: Whether the user can post to the social feed, comment, or chat. When false, the user can view social content but cannot contribute. Applied by status 3 (Chat Blocked) for social policy violations
new_audit_proposed_fix: Whether the user can post to the social feed, comment, or chat. When false the user can view social content but cannot contribute. Applied by status 3 (Chat Blocked) for social policy violations (Tier 1 - Dictionary.PlayerStatus)
old_judge_contradicting_fact: [9/15: Close Only] Close ✓, Login ✓ — everything else ✗
old_judge_suggested_rewrite: Whether the user can post to the social feed or chat. False when IsBlocked=1, for status 3 (Chat Blocked), and for close-only/pending statuses (9, 13, 15) where only Close and Login are permitted.
final_proposed_fix: Whether the user can post to the social feed, comment, or chat. When false the user can view social content but cannot contribute. Applied by status 3 (Chat Blocked) for social policy violations (Tier 1 - Dictionary.PlayerStatus)

current_desc: The hedge server ID the position was moved to. After this operation, Trade.PositionTbl.HedgeServerID equals this value for the affected position
old_judge_contradicting_fact:
PositionID	,FromHedgeServerID	,
OpenDateID,
CAST(CONVERT (VARCHAR(8) , dateadd(day,-1,CAST(OccurredDate AS DATE)), 112 ) AS INT),
GETDATE()
FROM #NewPositions
WHERE OpenDateID<OccurredDateID
old_judge_suggested_rewrite: The hedge server assigned to the position during the [FromDate, ToDate] period. For a new position's initial row this is the original FromHedgeServerID (before any change); for subsequent rows it is the ToHedgeServerID from the change-log event.
final_proposed_fix: The hedge server assigned to the position during the [FromDate, ToDate] period. For a new position's initial row this is the original FromHedgeServerID (before any change); for subsequent rows it is the ToHedgeServerID from the change-log event.

current_desc: Internal reason code name. DWH note: renamed from Name in production source. Prefix convention: Rre = Redeem Rejection, ServerError = service failure, Failed = processing failure. Values: RreTradeBlocked(1), RreFundingBlocked(2), RreDisputeProcess(3), RreInternalUser(4), RreVerificationLevel(5), ValidationDataIntegrity(6), RejectedByOps(7), FailedByTrading(8), FailedByWallet(9), CanceledByOps(10), ServerErrorTrading(11), ServerErrorWallet(12), ServerErrorSettings(13), DbError(14), CanceledByUser(15), NwaValidation(16), CancelledByTrading(18), FailedByDelta(19), TransferNegativeBalanceTerminated(20)
old_judge_suggested_rewrite: Internal reason code name, renamed from Name in production source. 18 distinct values (IDs 1–16, 18, 20; gaps at 17 and 19). Prefix conventions: Rre = Redeem Rejection, ServerError = service failure, Failed = processing failure. FailedByDelta(19) does not exist in the upstream dictionary.
final_proposed_fix: Internal reason code name, renamed from Name in production source. 18 distinct values (IDs 1–16, 18, 20; gaps at 17 and 19). Prefix conventions: Rre = Redeem Rejection, ServerError = service failure, Failed = processing failure. FailedByDelta(19) does not exist in the upstream dictionary.

current_desc: Status of the rollback at time of recording. Always 2 (InProcess) across all production rows — set from @CashoutStatusID parameter. Uses Dictionary.PaymentStatus: 1=New, 2=Approved, 3=Decline, 4=Technical, 5=InProcess, 6=Canceled, 7=Confirmed
source_desc: Status of the rollback at time of recording. Always 2 across all 7,349 rows (set from @CashoutStatusID parameter). Uses the same CashoutStatus lookup as Billing.Withdraw. The constant value 2 suggests rollbacks are only recorded when the payment is in a specific pre-rollback state
new_audit_proposed_fix: Status of the rollback at time of recording. Always 2 across all production rows — set from @CashoutStatusID parameter. Uses the same CashoutStatus lookup as Billing.Withdraw, not Dictionary.PaymentStatus. (Tier 1 - Billing.CashoutRollbackTracking.md)
old_judge_contradicting_fact: Approved (2) is the only terminal success state
old_judge_suggested_rewrite: Cashout status of the rollback record. Always 2 (Approved) across all production rows, indicating confirmed rollback operations. Uses Dictionary.PaymentStatus: 1=New, 2=Approved, 3=Decline, 4=Technical, 5=InProcess, 6=Canceled, 7=Confirmed.
final_proposed_fix: Status of the rollback at time of recording. Always 2 across all production rows — set from @CashoutStatusID parameter. Uses the same CashoutStatus lookup as Billing.Withdraw, not Dictionary.PaymentStatus. (Tier 1 - Billing.CashoutRollbackTracking.md)

current_desc: Position / ledger amount discipline per branch (cash change on opens; fee/deposit sizing on ledger rows — see lineage). Must be ≥0 on trade opens historically
old_judge_suggested_rewrite: Cash change amount associated with the action. Not always positive — set to -1 for login events (ActionTypeID=14) and reflects TotalCashChange for credit-based events, which can be negative.
final_proposed_fix: Cash change amount associated with the action. Not always positive — set to -1 for login events (ActionTypeID=14) and reflects TotalCashChange for credit-based events, which can be negative.

current_desc: Login session dwell seconds (NULL outside login cashier events)
old_judge_suggested_rewrite: Hardcoded to 0 for login events (ActionTypeID=14) in the current ETL; the legacy code that computed actual session duration from Billing.Login is commented out. Not a reliable duration measure.
final_proposed_fix: Hardcoded to 0 for login events (ActionTypeID=14) in the current ETL; the legacy code that computed actual session duration from Billing.Login is commented out. Not a reliable duration measure.
